description: Add task statuses with schema, backend, and UI support

userStories.title: Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task to have a status so that work state is tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Add non-null status column with default 'pending'

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task's status so that the system records progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Add API or server action to update status

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a badge on each task card showing current status so I can scan progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows for inline edits
userStories.description: As a user, I want a control in task row to change status so I can update quickly from list.
acceptanceCriteria: Inline control updates status via backend action
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so I can focus on specific work state.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter options: All, Pending, In Progress, Done
Filter persists per session or via query params
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
